name: systematic-debugging
author: ChrisWiles
description: Four-phase debugging methodology with root cause analysis. Use when investigating bugs, fixing test failures, or troubleshooting unexpected behavior. Emphasizes NO FIXES WITHOUT ROOT CAUSE FIRST.
description_zh: 一个结构化的四阶段调试方法，强制要求先进行根本原因分析再修复。提供调查错误、分析模式、测试假设和实施解决方案的具体步骤。包含检查清单、危险信号和常见场景指南，防止治标不治本的修补。
_original_description: A structured four-phase debugging methodology that enforces root cause analysis before fixes. Provides concrete steps for investigating bugs, analyzing patterns, testing hypotheses, and implementing solutions. Includes specific checklists, red flags, and common scenario guides to prevent symptom-focused patches.

name: chrome-devtools
author: ChromeDevTools
description: Uses Chrome DevTools via MCP for efficient debugging, troubleshooting and browser automation. Use when debugging web pages, automating browser interactions, analyzing performance, or inspecting network requests. This skill does not apply to `--slim` mode (MCP configuration).
_original_description: Uses Chrome DevTools via MCP for efficient debugging, troubleshooting and browser automation. Use when debugging web pages, automating browser interactions, analyzing performance, or inspecting network requests.

name: build
author: ClickHouse
description: Build ClickHouse with various configurations (Release, Debug, ASAN, TSAN, etc.). Use when the user wants to compile ClickHouse.

name: analyzing-projects
author: CloudAI-X
description: Analyzes codebases to understand structure, tech stack, patterns, and conventions. Use when onboarding to a new project, exploring unfamiliar code, or when asked "how does this work?" or "what's the architecture?"

name: convex-backend
author: CloudAI-X
description: Convex backend development guidelines. Use when writing Convex functions, schemas, queries, mutations, actions, or any backend code in a Convex project. Triggers on tasks involving Convex database operations, real-time subscriptions, file storage, or serverless functions.

name: designing-apis
author: CloudAI-X
description: Designs REST and GraphQL APIs including endpoints, error handling, versioning, and documentation. Use when creating new APIs, designing endpoints, reviewing API contracts, or when asked about REST, GraphQL, or API patterns.

name: designing-architecture
author: CloudAI-X
description: Designs software architecture and selects appropriate patterns for projects. Use when designing systems, choosing architecture patterns, structuring projects, making technical decisions, or when asked about microservices, monoliths, or architectural approaches.

name: designing-tests
author: CloudAI-X
description: Designs and implements testing strategies for any codebase. Use when adding tests, improving coverage, setting up testing infrastructure, debugging test failures, or when asked about unit tests, integration tests, or E2E testing.

name: managing-git
author: CloudAI-X
description: Manages Git workflows including branching, commits, and pull requests. Use when working with Git, creating commits, opening PRs, managing branches, resolving conflicts, or when asked about version control best practices.

name: optimizing-performance
author: CloudAI-X
description: Analyzes and optimizes application performance across frontend, backend, and database layers. Use when diagnosing slowness, improving load times, optimizing queries, reducing bundle size, or when asked about performance issues.

name: parallel-execution
author: CloudAI-X
description: Patterns for parallel subagent execution using Task tool with run_in_background. Use when coordinating multiple independent tasks, spawning dynamic subagents, or implementing features that can be parallelized.

name: web-design-guidelines
author: CloudAI-X
description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", "check my site against best practices", or "web interface guidelines".
_original_description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".

name: optimizing-claude-code
author: CodeAlive-AI
description: Audits repositories for Claude Code readiness and suggests improvements. Use when asked to check CLAUDE.md quality, review settings, audit project organization, or optimize for agentic work.

name: aws-agentic-ai
author: CommandCodeAI
description: AWS Bedrock AgentCore comprehensive expert for deploying and managing all AgentCore services. Use when working with Gateway, Runtime, Memory, Identity, or any AgentCore component. Covers MCP target deployment, credential management, schema optimization, runtime configuration, memory management, and identity services.

name: aws-cdk-development
author: CommandCodeAI
description: AWS Cloud Development Kit (CDK) expert for building cloud infrastructure with TypeScript/Python. Use when creating CDK stacks, defining CDK constructs, implementing infrastructure as code, or when the user mentions CDK, CloudFormation, IaC, cdk synth, cdk deploy, or wants to define AWS infrastructure programmatically. Covers CDK app structure, construct patterns, stack composition, and deployment workflows.

name: aws-cost-operations
author: CommandCodeAI
description: This skill provides AWS cost optimization, monitoring, and operational best practices with integrated MCP servers for billing analysis, cost estimation, observability, and security assessment.

name: building-ai-agent-on-cloudflare
author: CommandCodeAI
description:
Builds AI agents on Cloudflare using the Agents SDK with state management,
real-time WebSockets, scheduled tasks, tool integration, and chat capabilities.
Generates production-ready agent code deployed to Workers.

Use when: user wants to "build an agent", "AI agent", "chat agent", "stateful
agent", mentions "Agents SDK", needs "real-time AI", "WebSocket AI", or asks
about agent "state management", "scheduled tasks", or "tool calling".

name: building-mcp-server-on-cloudflare
author: CommandCodeAI
description:
Builds remote MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers on Cloudflare Workers
with tools, OAuth authentication, and production deployment. Generates
server code, configures auth providers, and deploys to Workers.

Use when: user wants to "build MCP server", "create MCP tools", "remote
MCP", "deploy MCP", add "OAuth to MCP", or mentions Model Context Protocol
on Cloudflare. Also triggers on "MCP authentication" or "MCP deployment".

name: connect
author: ComposioHQ
description: Connect Claude to any app. Send emails, create issues, post messages, update databases - take real actions across Gmail, Slack, GitHub, Notion, and 1000+ services.
description_zh: 该技能将Claude连接到1000多个外部应用（如Gmail、Slack、GitHub），实现真实操作而非仅生成文本。自动处理OAuth授权流程，提供清晰的设置说明和多种框架示例。工具路由器智能选择适合的集成方案。
_original_description: This skill connects Claude to 1000+ external apps like Gmail, Slack, and GitHub, enabling actual actions instead of just generating text. It handles OAuth flows automatically and provides clear setup instructions with multiple framework examples. The tool router intelligently selects the right integration for each request.

name: lemon-squeezy-automation
author: ComposioHQ
description: Automate Lemon Squeezy tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): products, orders, subscriptions, checkouts, and digital sales. Always search tools first for current schemas.

name: twitter-algorithm-optimizer
author: ComposioHQ
description: Analyze and optimize tweets for maximum reach using Twitter's open-source algorithm insights. Rewrite and edit user tweets to improve engagement and visibility based on how the recommendation system ranks content.

name: zoho-inventory-automation
author: ComposioHQ
description: Automate Zoho Inventory tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): items, orders, warehouses, shipments, and stock management. Always search tools first for current schemas.

name: cascade-orchestrator
author: DNYoussef
description: Creates sophisticated workflow cascades coordinating multiple micro-skills with sequential pipelines, parallel execution, conditional branching, and Codex sandbox iteration. Enhanced with multi-model routing (Gemini/Codex), ruv-swarm coordination, memory persistence, and audit-pipeline patterns for production workflows.
description_zh: 将多个Claude微技能编排成顺序或并行工作流，支持条件分支。集成Codex沙盒自动修复测试失败，根据任务需求路由到不同AI模型（Gemini/Codex）。通过ruv-swarm MCP支持群组协调并行执行。
_original_description: Coordinates multiple Claude micro-skills into sequential or parallel workflows with conditional logic. Integrates Codex sandbox for auto-fixing test failures and routes tasks to different AI models (Gemini/Codex) based on task requirements. Supports swarm coordination via ruv-swarm MCP for parallel execution.

name: cicd-intelligent-recovery
author: DNYoussef
description: Loop 3 of the Three-Loop Integrated Development System. CI/CD automation with intelligent failure recovery, root cause analysis, and comprehensive quality validation. Receives implementation from Loop 2, feeds failure patterns back to Loop 1. Achieves 100% test success through automated repair and theater validation. v2.0.0 with explicit agent SOPs.
description_zh: 用于持续集成工作流程的CI/CD自动化技能，具备自动故障恢复、根因分析和质量验证功能，通过基于证据的提示和系统化操作实现。
_original_description: A CI/CD automation skill for continuous integration workflows with automated failure recovery, root cause analysis, and quality validation through evidence-based prompting and systematic operations.

name: code-review-assistant
author: DNYoussef
description: Comprehensive PR review using multi-agent swarm with specialized reviewers for security, performance, style, tests, and documentation. Provides detailed feedback with auto-fix suggestions and merge readiness assessment.
description_zh: 一个多智能体代码审查技能，通过安全、性能、风格、测试和文档等专项审查员，为PR提供系统性分析、详细反馈和自动修复建议。
_original_description: A multi-agent code review skill that provides systematic PR analysis with specialized reviewers for security, performance, style, tests, and documentation, offering detailed feedback and auto-fix suggestions.

name: cognitive-mode
author: DNYoussef
description: Comprehensive cognitive mode management skill for the VERILINGUA x VERIX x DSPy x GlobalMOO integration. Enables automatic mode selection, frame configuration, VERIX epistemic notation, and GlobalMOO optimization. Use this skill when configuring AI behavior for specific task types, optimizing prompt engineering, or ensuring epistemic consistency in responses.
description_zh: 一个用于管理AI认知模式、优化提示配置并通过VERILINGUA和GlobalMOO等集成框架确保认知一致性的技能。

name: github-integration
author: DNYoussef
description: Build reliable GitHub integrations, webhooks, and automation bridges
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化框架，用于构建安全、可靠的GitHub集成、Webhook和自动化桥接。它强调库优先重用、安全设计以及具备回滚能力的全面验证。

name: llm-council
author: DNYoussef
description: Multi-model consensus using Karpathy LLM Council pattern for critical decisions
description_zh: 一个基于Karpathy LLM Council模式的多模型共识技能，通过结构化审议多个AI模型的意见，为关键决策提供验证和共识。

name: micro-skill-creator
author: DNYoussef
description: Rapidly creates atomic, focused skills optimized with evidence-based prompting, specialist agents, and systematic testing. Each micro-skill does one thing exceptionally well using self-consistency, program-of-thought, and plan-and-solve patterns. Enhanced with agent-creator principles and functionality-audit validation. Perfect for building composable workflow components.

name: pptx-generation
author: DNYoussef
description: Enterprise-grade PowerPoint deck generation system using evidence-based prompting techniques, workflow enforcement, and constraint-based design. Use when creating professional presentations (board decks, reports, analyses) requiring consistent visual quality, accessibility compliance, and integration of complex data from multiple sources. Implements html2pptx workflow with spatial layout optimization, validation gates, and multi-chat architecture for 30+ slide decks.

name: ralph-multimodel
author: DNYoussef
description: Ralph Wiggum persistence loop with intelligent multi-model routing (Gemini, Codex, Claude, Council)
description_zh: 一个Claude技能，扩展了Ralph Wiggum持久性模式，具备智能多模型路由功能。它根据任务阶段自动选择最优AI模型（Gemini、Codex、Claude或LLM委员会），用于复杂的多阶段开发和研发项目。

name: reflect
author: DNYoussef
description: Extract learnings from session corrections and patterns, update skill files with persistent memory. Implements Loop 1.5 - per-session micro-learning between execution and meta-optimization.
description_zh: 一个Claude技能，从会话修正中提取学习模式并更新技能文件，实现跨对话的持续改进和持久记忆。

name: skill-creator-agent
author: DNYoussef
description: Creates Claude Code skills where each skill is tied to a specialist agent optimized with evidence-based prompting techniques. Use this skill when users need to create reusable skills that leverage specialized agents for consistent high-quality performance. The skill ensures that each created skill spawns an appropriately crafted agent that communicates effectively with the parent Claude Code instance using best practices.
description_zh: 一个用于创建专业化Claude代码技能的元工具，通过将每个技能与基于证据的提示技术优化的智能体绑定，实现系统化的工作流程。
_original_description: A meta-tool for creating specialized Claude Code skills by tying each skill to an optimized agent using evidence-based prompting techniques and systematic workflows.

name: sop-api-development
author: DNYoussef
description: Complete REST API development workflow coordinating backend, database, testing, documentation, and DevOps agents. 2-week timeline with TDD approach.

name: theater-detection-audit
author: DNYoussef
description: Performs comprehensive audits to detect placeholder code, mock data, TODO markers, and incomplete implementations in codebases. Use this skill when you need to find all instances of "theater" in code such as hardcoded mock responses, stub functions, commented-out production logic, or fake data that needs to be replaced with real implementations. The skill systematically identifies these instances, reads their full context, and completes them with production-quality code.

name: verification-and-quality-assurance
author: DNYoussef
description: Comprehensive truth scoring, code quality verification, and automatic rollback system with 0.95 accuracy threshold for ensuring high-quality agent outputs and codebase reliability.
description_zh: 一个全面的质量保证技能，执行真相评分、代码验证和自动回滚，具有高精度阈值，以确保可靠的代理输出和代码库完整性。

name: when-analyzing-skill-gaps-use-skill-gap-analyzer

description: Analyze skill library to identify coverage gaps, redundant overlaps, optimization opportunities, and provide recommendations for skill portfolio improvement

name: when-analyzing-user-intent-use-intent-analyzer
author: DNYoussef
description: Advanced intent interpretation system using cognitive science principles and probabilistic intent mapping

author: DNYoussef
description: Advanced GitHub Actions workflow automation with AI swarm coordination, intelligent CI/CD pipelines, and comprehensive repository management. Coordinates cicd-engineer, workflow-automation, tester, and security-auditor agents through mesh topology to create, optimize, and maintain GitHub Actions workflows. Handles workflow generation, performance optimization, security hardening, matrix testing strategies, and workflow debugging. Use when building CI/CD pipelines, optimizing existing workflows, or establishing automation standards.

name: when-bridging-web-cli-use-web-cli-teleport
author: DNYoussef
description: Bridge web interfaces with CLI workflows for seamless bidirectional integration

name: when-building-backend-api-orchestrate-api-development
author: DNYoussef
description:
Use when building a production-ready REST API from requirements through deployment.
Orchestrates 8-12 specialist agents across 5 phases using Test-Driven Development methodology.
Covers planning, architecture, TDD implementation, comprehensive testing, documentation, and
blue-green deployment over a 2-week timeline with emphasis on quality and reliability.

name: when-chaining-agent-pipelines-use-stream-chain
author: DNYoussef
description: Chain agent outputs as inputs in sequential or parallel pipelines for data flow orchestration

name: when-creating-presentations-use-pptx-generation
author: DNYoussef
description: Enterprise-grade PowerPoint deck generation using evidence-based prompting, workflow enforcement, constraint-based design

name: when-creating-slash-commands-use-slash-command-encoder
author: DNYoussef
description: Create ergonomic slash commands for fast access to micro-skills with auto-discovery and parameter validation

name: when-debugging-ml-training-use-ml-training-debugger
author: DNYoussef
description: Debug ML training issues and optimize performance including loss divergence, overfitting, and slow convergence

name: when-developing-ml-models-use-ml-expert
author: DNYoussef
description: Specialized ML model development, training, and deployment workflow

name: when-documenting-code-use-doc-generator
author: DNYoussef
description: Automated comprehensive code documentation generation with API docs, README files, inline comments, and architecture diagrams
description_zh: 自动化代码文档生成工具，分析项目结构，生成OpenAPI规范的API文档，创建README文件，添加JSDoc风格的内联注释，并生成架构图。采用SPARC方法，包含需求分析、结构设计、生成和验证四个阶段。
_original_description: Automates code documentation by analyzing project structure, generating API specs in OpenAPI format, creating README files, adding JSDoc-style inline comments, and producing architecture diagrams. Follows a structured SPARC methodology with clear phases for specification, design, generation, and validation.

name: when-managing-github-projects-use-github-project-management
author: DNYoussef
description: Comprehensive GitHub project management with swarm-coordinated issue tracking, project board automation, and sprint planning. Coordinates planner, issue-tracker, and project-board-sync agents to automate issue triage, sprint planning, milestone tracking, and project board updates. Integrates with GitHub Projects v2 API for advanced automation, custom fields, and workflow orchestration. Use when managing development projects, coordinating team workflows, or automating project management tasks.

name: when-managing-multiple-repos-use-github-multi-repo
author: DNYoussef
description: Multi-repository coordination, synchronization, and architecture management with AI swarm orchestration. Coordinates repo-architect, code-analyzer, and coordinator agents across multiple repositories to maintain consistency, propagate changes, manage dependencies, and ensure architectural alignment. Handles monorepo-to-multi-repo migrations, cross-repo refactoring, and synchronized releases. Use when managing microservices, multi-package ecosystems, or coordinating changes across related repositories.

name: when-mapping-dependencies-use-dependency-mapper
author: DNYoussef
description: Comprehensive dependency mapping, analysis, and visualization tool for software projects

name: when-optimizing-agent-learning-use-reasoningbank-intelligence
author: DNYoussef
description: Implement adaptive learning with ReasoningBank for pattern recognition, strategy optimization, and continuous improvement

name: when-optimizing-prompts-use-prompt-architect
author: DNYoussef
description: Comprehensive framework for analyzing, creating, and refining prompts for AI systems using evidence-based techniques

name: when-optimizing-prompts-use-prompt-optimization-analyzer
author: DNYoussef
description: Active diagnostic tool for analyzing prompt quality, detecting anti-patterns, identifying token waste, and providing optimization recommendations

name: when-orchestrating-swarm-use-swarm-orchestration
author: DNYoussef
description: Complex multi-agent swarm orchestration with task decomposition, distributed execution, and result synthesis

name: when-profiling-performance-use-performance-profiler
author: DNYoussef

name: when-releasing-new-product-orchestrate-product-launch
author: DNYoussef
description:
Use when launching a new product end-to-end from market research through post-launch monitoring.
Orchestrates 15+ specialist agents across 5 phases in a 10-week coordinated workflow including
research, development, marketing, sales preparation, launch execution, and ongoing optimization.
Employs hierarchical coordination with parallel execution for efficiency and comprehensive coverage.

name: when-releasing-software-use-github-release-management
author: DNYoussef
description: Comprehensive GitHub release orchestration with AI swarm coordination for automated versioning, testing, deployment, and rollback management. Coordinates release-manager, cicd-engineer, tester, and docs-writer agents through hierarchical topology to handle semantic versioning, changelog generation, release notes, deployment validation, and post-release monitoring. Supports multiple release strategies (rolling, blue-green, canary) and automated rollback. Use when creating releases, managing deployments, or coordinating version updates.

author: DNYoussef
description: Comprehensive GitHub pull request code review using multi-agent swarm with specialized reviewers for security, performance, style, tests, and documentation. Coordinates security-auditor, perf-analyzer, code-analyzer, tester, and reviewer agents through mesh topology for parallel analysis. Provides detailed feedback with auto-fix suggestions and merge readiness assessment. Use when reviewing PRs, conducting code audits, or ensuring code quality standards before merge.

name: when-using-advanced-swarm-use-swarm-advanced
author: DNYoussef
description: Advanced swarm patterns with dynamic topology switching and self-organizing behaviors for complex multi-agent coordination

name: lading-optimize-hunt
author: DataDog
description: Coordinates optimization attempts. Captures baselines, implements changes, invokes review, and records outcomes.
_original_description: Systematic optimization hunter for lading. Finds memory optimizations AND bugs - both are valuable. Run /lading-optimize-validate when bugs are discovered.

name: lading-optimize-review
author: DataDog
description: Reviews optimization patches using a 5-persona peer review system. Requires unanimous approval backed by benchmarks.
_original_description: Reviews optimization patches for lading using a 5-persona peer review system. Requires unanimous approval backed by benchmarks. Bugs discovered during review are valuable - invoke /lading-optimize-validate to validate them.

name: lading-optimize-submit
author: DataDog
description: Full optimization workflow with git branch creation, commits, and optional PR. Wraps /lading-optimize-hunt with git automation.

name: lading-preflight
author: DataDog
description: Environment validation checklist. Run this FIRST when starting a new Claude session to verify the environment is ready for optimization work. Checks Rust toolchain, ci/ scripts, build, benchmarking tools, profilers, memory tools, and git state.
_original_description: Environment validation checklist. Run this FIRST when starting a new Claude session to verify the environment is ready for optimization work. Checks Rust toolchain, ci/ scripts, hyperfine, profilers, payloadtool, git, and database access.

name: unity-compile-fixer
author: Dev-GOM
description: Detect and resolve Unity C# compilation errors using VSCode diagnostics. Use this skill when Unity projects have compilation errors that need diagnosis and automated fixes. Analyzes errors from VSCode Language Server, proposes solutions based on error patterns, and handles version control conflicts for Unity projects.
description_zh: 该技能通过VSCode诊断检测Unity C#编译错误，根据错误模式数据库分析问题，并提供修复建议供用户确认。它处理常见的Unity特定问题，如缺少命名空间引用和.meta文件冲突，在应用更改前需要用户明确批准。
_original_description: This skill detects Unity C# compilation errors from VSCode diagnostics, analyzes error patterns against a database, and proposes fixes for user approval. It handles common Unity-specific issues like missing imports and .meta file conflicts, requiring explicit user confirmation before applying changes.

name: unity-editor-toolkit
author: Dev-GOM
description:
Unity Editor control and automation, WebSocket-based real-time communication. 유니티에디터제어및자동화, WebSocket기반실시간통신.

Features/기능: GameObject control 게임오브젝트제어, Transform manipulation 트랜스폼조작, Component management 컴포넌트관리, Scene management 씬관리, SQLite database integration SQLite데이터베이스통합, GUID-based persistence GUID기반영구식별, Multi-scene synchronization 멀티씬동기화, Command Pattern with Undo/Redo 명령패턴실행취소재실행, Menu execution 메뉴실행, ScriptableObject management 스크립터블오브젝트관리, Array/List manipulation 배열리스트조작, All field types support 모든필드타입지원, Material/Rendering 머티리얼/렌더링, Prefab system 프리팹시스템, Asset Database 애셋데이터베이스, Animation 애니메이션, Physics 물리, Console logging 콘솔로깅, EditorPrefs management 에디터프리퍼런스관리, Editor automation 에디터자동화, Build pipeline 빌드파이프라인, Lighting 라이팅, Camera 카메라, Audio 오디오, Navigation 네비게이션, Particles 파티클, Timeline 타임라인, UI Toolkit, Profiler 프로파일러, Test Runner 테스트러너.

Protocol 프로토콜: JSON-RPC 2.0 over WebSocket (port 9500-9600). 500+ commands 명령어, 25 categories 카테고리. Real-time bidirectional communication 실시간양방향통신.

Security 보안: Defense-in-depth 심층방어 (path traversal protection 경로순회방지, command injection defense 명령어인젝션방어, JSON injection prevention JSON인젝션방지, SQL injection prevention SQL인젝션방지, transaction safety 트랜잭션안전성). Localhost-only connections 로컬호스트전용. Cross-platform 크로스플랫폼 (Windows, macOS, Linux).
description_zh: 通过WebSocket提供Unity编辑器控制，包含500多个命令用于游戏对象操作、场景管理、组件操作和SQLite数据库集成。支持从Claude Code通过JSON-RPC 2.0协议在本地端口9500-9600上实现Unity工作流程的脚本自动化。
_original_description: Provides WebSocket-based control of Unity Editor with 500+ commands for GameObject manipulation, scene management, component operations, and SQLite database integration. Enables scripted automation of Unity workflows from Claude Code via JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol on localhost ports 9500-9600.

name: unity-scene-optimizer
author: Dev-GOM
description: Analyzes scenes for performance bottlenecks (draw calls, batching, textures, GameObjects). Use when optimizing scenes or investigating performance issues.
description_zh: 分析Unity场景在渲染、物理和内存方面的性能瓶颈。提供针对不同平台（移动端、PC、主机）的绘制调用、三角形数量和纹理内存的具体目标值。明确界定了其使用场景与其他相关工具的区别。
_original_description: Analyzes Unity scenes for performance bottlenecks across rendering, physics, and memory. Provides concrete platform-specific targets for draw calls, triangles, and texture memory. Clearly defines when to use it versus other tools in the toolkit.

name: unity-script-validator
author: Dev-GOM
description: Validates C# scripts for best practices, performance, and Unity patterns. Use when reviewing scripts or checking code quality.
description_zh: 结构良好的Unity C#脚本静态分析工具，可验证最佳实践、提升代码质量并提供可操作的性能建议。
_original_description: A well-structured static analysis tool for Unity C# scripts that validates best practices, improves code quality, and provides actionable performance suggestions.

name: unity-template-generator
author: Dev-GOM
description: Generates production-ready C# script templates (MonoBehaviour, ScriptableObject, Editor, tests). Use when creating new scripts or setting up project structure.
description_zh: 为Unity开发生成C#脚本模板，包括MonoBehaviour、ScriptableObject、编辑器脚本和测试脚本。遵循Unity最佳实践，包含序列化字段、组件缓存和安全检查，帮助开发者建立统一的代码结构。
_original_description: Generates Unity C# script templates for MonoBehaviour, ScriptableObject, Editor scripts, and tests. Follows Unity conventions with serialized fields, component caching, and safety checks. Helps developers create consistent code structure and avoid common Unity performance pitfalls.

name: unity-test-runner
author: Dev-GOM
description: Execute and analyze Unity Test Framework tests from the command line. This skill automates test execution for Unity projects by detecting the Unity Editor, configuring test parameters (EditMode/PlayMode), running tests via CLI, parsing XML results, and generating detailed failure reports. Use this when running Unity tests, validating game logic, or debugging test failures.
description_zh: 一个全面的Unity测试自动化技能，提供端到端的测试执行、结果解析和失败分析，具有详细的工作流程指导和跨平台支持。
_original_description: A comprehensive Unity test automation skill that provides end-to-end test execution, result parsing, and failure analysis with detailed workflow guidance and cross-platform support.

name: unity-ui-selector
author: Dev-GOM
description: Guides selection between UGUI and UI Toolkit for projects. Use when choosing UI framework or migrating UI systems.
description_zh: 一个结构清晰的决策指南，通过版本矩阵和实用建议，有效帮助Unity开发者在UGUI和UI Toolkit之间做出选择。
_original_description: A well-structured decision guide that effectively helps Unity developers choose between UGUI and UI Toolkit with clear comparisons, version matrices, and practical migration advice.

name: unity-uitoolkit
author: Dev-GOM
description: Assists with Unity UI Toolkit development - UXML structure, USS styling, C# VisualElement manipulation, data binding, and custom controls. Use when implementing UI Toolkit interfaces.
description_zh: 为Unity UI Toolkit开发提供指导，涵盖UXML结构、USS样式模式和C# VisualElement操作。包含编辑器窗口设置、类切换和数据绑定等常见任务的具体代码示例。帮助开发者遵循Unity推荐的UI Toolkit最佳实践。
_original_description: Provides guidance for Unity UI Toolkit development including UXML structure, USS styling patterns, and C# VisualElement manipulation. Offers concrete code examples for common tasks like editor window setup, class toggling, and data binding. Helps developers follow Unity's recommended UI Toolkit practices.

name: math-extractor
